raw_text:
53. Manufacturing Manager (Tooling)

Job Summary  
Oversees manufacturing operations related to to oling, ensuring efficiency, quality, and cost -
effectiveness.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Manage tooling manufacturing processes  
• Optimize production efficiency and output  
• Implement lean manufacturing practices  
• Monitor KPIs and performance metrics  
• Lead cross -functional teams  
• Ensure compliance with safety and quality standards  
Required Skills  
• Manufacturing operations expertise  
• Leadership and strategic thinking  
• Process improvement and lean principles  
• Data -driven decision -making  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Production  
Experience  
• 10–18 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹70,000 – ₹1,80,000 per month
